title: Consultation response on Non-Jury Trials in Northern Ireland, May 2025
body: "On 9 December 2024, the Northern Ireland Office launched a 12-week public consultation seeking views on whether the non-jury trial provisions within the Justice and Security (Northern Ireland) Act 2007 (the 2007 Act) should be extended for a further two years.  The consultation closed on 3 March 2025. This response contains an analysis of the consultation responses received and the subsequent decision that the Secretary of State for Northern Ireland has made to extend the non-jury trial provisions within the 2007 Act.  The response can be found here:  Consultation response on Non-Jury Trials in Northern Ireland  (PDF, 2.17 MB, 42 pages) "
